title: can't determine constant for FUNCREF when define parameter

features.name: parameter expression calling function with unpacked array input
features.description: Code should include a parameter assignment that calls a function where that function takes an unpacked array as input

features.name: function with multi-dimensional unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a function that has a multi-dimensional unpacked array as an input parameter

features.name: unpacked array concatenation in function call argument
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array concatenation used as a function argument within a parameter expression
